shorts.title: Residents celebrate Earth Month with E recycling event
shorts.title_distilled: Residents celebrate Earth Month with E recycling event.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — This month is Earth Month, and the City of Scranton is helping residents make sure they're doing their spring cleaning properly. On Sunday morning, officials held their first Electronics Recycling event of the year. The event kicked off at 9:00 a.m. and continued through noon at the Department of Public [...]

shorts.title: Local school supports businesses with Spring Vendor Market
shorts.title_distilled: Local school supports businesses with Spring Vendor Market.
shorts.description: DUNMORE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A local school is bringing the community together, all while supporting small businesses. The Dunmore PTA hosted its Spring Vendor Market on Sunday at the Dunmore Elementary Center. Roughly 30 local vendors filled the gym, selling everything from handmade crafts and clothing to sweet treats and empanadas. Organizers say the [...]
